Name: TypeOfSample
Description: A generic means of classifying a SamplingProcedure. Supports the use of an external controlled vocabulary.

Name: Label
Description: A display label for the sample.

Name: Description
Description: Full description of the sample. Supports structured content and multiple language content.

Name: PopulationOfConcern
Description: Describe the population being sampled through a combination of textual description and reference to a structured Universe.

Name: OverallTargetSampleSize
Description: The target value of the sample size for the primary and any secondary or sub-population.

Name: OverallSampleSize
Description: The size of the overall sample actually used.

Name: ApplicationDetails
Description: Provides sample stage level details where needed. Repeat for individual stages or sub-stages.

Name: DateOfSample
Description: Date the sample was taken. May be expressed as a single date or range. If the sample was created using multiple extractions at different dates, repeat for each date.

Name: SampleLocationReference
Description: Description of general limitations of the frame, including  over/under-coverage and update schedules and procedures.

Name: SamplingPlanImplementedReference
Description: A reference to the SamplingPlan implemented to creating the sample. Target object should be SamplingPlan

Name: SampleFrameUsedReference
Description: A reference to the SampleFrame used for creating the sample. Target object should be SampleFrame

Name: ComponentSampleReference
Description: A reference to a previously created sample that was used as a component of the current sample. Target object should be Sample.
